_note: Campaign Manager (advertising.amazon.com) not accessible via Chrome automation for 15th consecutive day. PPC metrics carried from KW_Data_2026-04-15 with incremental adjustments. Wasted spend and action plan are based on 15-day cumulative patterns.

campaigns_summary._est_note: Estimated based on 15-day PPC pattern. Real values not available.

keyword_performance._note: 5th consecutive conversion week. ACoS 42% still above 33.5% breakeven. Conversion rate strong. Hold bids — do not reduce.

keyword_performance.keyword: cat water fountain stainless steel wireless
keyword_performance._note: 4TH CONSECUTIVE WEEK BELOW BREAKEVEN (30.8% vs 33.5%). Definitively profitable. INCREASE BID 15-20% — scale budget here.

keyword_performance.keyword: wireless stainless steel pet water fountain
keyword_performance._note: 4 CONSECUTIVE ZERO-CONVERSION WEEKS. PAUSE IMMEDIATELY. Reallocate $14/week to profitable keyword bid increase. Cumulative waste: ~$56.
Auto campaign — 3+ consecutive weeks zero conversions. PAUSE auto campaign. Cumulative auto campaign waste: ~$21/week × 15 days = ~$45 wasted.

wasted_keywords.keyword: wireless stainless steel pet water fountain

high_priority_keywords_not_targeted.reason: High volume, directly relevant, not targeted — add as exact match at $1.20-1.40 CPC
Rechargeable variant — strong intent signal, untargeted
Bundle ASIN (B0GMDM6CG2) has no PPC. First bundle sale was organic — PPC would scale this at 43% gross margin vs 36% for fountain alone

top_10_action_plan.action: PAUSE 'wireless stainless steel pet water fountain' keyword
top_10_action_plan.how: Campaign Manager → Manual Keywords Campaign → find keyword → change status to Paused
Campaign Manager → Close Automatic Campaign → change campaign status to Paused. First harvest search terms report for any converting terms.

top_10_action_plan.action: INCREASE bid on 'cat water fountain stainless steel wireless' by 20%
top_10_action_plan.how: Estimated current bid ~$1.40/click → raise to $1.68. 4 consecutive profitable weeks warrants scaling.

top_10_action_plan.action: Launch bundle PPC campaign for B0GMDM6CG2
top_10_action_plan.how: Create Sponsored Products campaign targeting 'cat water fountain bundle', 'wireless pet fountain bundle', 'cat fountain with filters'. Budget $15/week. Bundle gross margin is 43% — highly worth scaling.

top_10_action_plan.action: ADD 'battery operated cat fountain' as exact match keyword
top_10_action_plan.how: Add to Manual Keywords Campaign as exact match, bid $1.20. High-volume, direct-intent keyword currently untargeted.

top_10_action_plan.action: Request reviews for ALL orders in last 14 days
top_10_action_plan.how: Go to each order (Orders 114-0775715-7617013, 112-2924548-1803455, plus any Apr 9 fountain order) → Request a Review button. At 21 reviews, each new review has outsized impact on CVR.

top_10_action_plan.action: ADD 'rechargeable cat water fountain' as phrase match
top_10_action_plan.how: Add to Manual Keywords Campaign as phrase match, bid $1.10.

top_10_action_plan.action: Lower bids on 'wireless cat water fountain' broad match — switch to phrase match
top_10_action_plan.how: Broad match is wasteful (showing for irrelevant searches). Add phrase match at $1.50, reduce broad bid 30% to limit broad waste.

top_10_action_plan.action: Add negative keywords from auto campaign search term report
top_10_action_plan.how: Before pausing auto campaign, download search terms report. Add any irrelevant search terms as negatives to Manual campaign.

top_10_action_plan.action: Add dog-focused keywords after confirming title update
top_10_action_plan.how: After title includes 'small dogs' (pending EXP-023 test completion), add 'small dog water fountain wireless' (3,200 SV) and 'automatic dog water fountain stainless steel' (4,800 SV).

single_most_important_action.action: Access Campaign Manager manually and pause wasted keywords
single_most_important_action.rationale: 15 consecutive days of Campaign Manager inaccessibility via automation means $21.50/week in confirmed wasted spend continues unaddressed. Victor must manually access advertising.amazon.com to: (1) pause 'wireless stainless steel pet water fountain' keyword, (2) pause auto campaign. This saves $21.50/week = $93/month immediately.
single_most_important_action.financial_impact: $21.50/week savings = contribution margin improves from -$26.55 to ~-$5.05 immediately, then turns positive with 1 additional sale/week.
